title: Beacon Commands
description:
Tired of having to build pyramids everywhere or move them as you move outside the beacon range? 
this datapack gives you commands to all the effects a beacon can give you.
body:
Tired of having to build pyramids everywhere or move them as you move outside the beacon range? 
this datapack gives you commands to all the effects a beacon can give you.

using the /trigger command to give you infinite effect(it wont run out) of your choice.
the effects you can choose from is Haste, Regeneration(regen), Resistance(resist), Speed, Strength, Jump Boost & Clear(removes all effect)
and all of them also comes with secondary powers just as in a real beacon. just add the number 2 on the end(ie haste2)

there is also a trigger for Conduit Power making underwater adventures a lot easier.

example: 
typing "/trigger haste2" would give you haste II that never runs out

typing "/trigger clear" would clear all effects (this includes potions and effects like poison, bad omen, mining fatigue etc) it's basically a bucket of milk in text form!
